title: Stack Implementation using an Array
description: A visual representation of a stack data structure implemented using an array, showing the array, stack pointer (top), and core operations.
relationships: The Stack Pointer (top) tracks the index of the topmost element. Push adds an element at top+1 and increments top. Pop returns the element at top and decrements top. Peek returns the element at top without modifying the stack. isEmpty checks if top == -1. isFull checks if top == array.length - 1.
